name: ScanTarget
description: ScanTarget schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma AIRS AI Red Teaming API

target_id.description: Unique identifier of the scan target.

name.description: Display name of the scan target.

description.description: Description of the target AI application.

type.description: AI interface type of the target endpoint.

endpoint_url.description: URL of the AI application endpoint.

model.description: AI model name or identifier used by the endpoint.
